theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Fits the 'Indian Bazaar' brand requirement perfectly. Needs warmth, trust, and a natural, tactile feel to present cross-border Indian craftsmanship appealingly, avoiding the generic sterile look of standard e-commerce platforms.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 text-slate-900 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-bold transition-all
buttons.seller: bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold shadow-sm

cards.product: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 group flex flex-col
cards.seller_info: bg-violet-50 border border-violet-100 rounded-xl p-4 text-violet-900

badges.in_stock: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide border border-emerald-200
badges.seller: bg-violet-100 text-violet-800 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide border border-violet-200

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm

motion_guidelines.hover_states: Soft lift (-translate-y-1) and ambient shadow increase on product cards.
motion_guidelines.add_to_cart: Micro-interaction: button scale down to 0.95 on active, slight pulse effect on success. Badge counter pop animation in header.
motion_guidelines.page_transitions: Smooth fade-in for page content to maintain perceived performance and premium feel.

page_specific_guidelines.homepage: Hero carousel with dark transparent overlay (max bg-black/40) for text contrast. Bento-grid for featured categories. Multi-currency and country switcher prominently shown in header.
page_specific_guidelines.product_list: Sidebar layout on desktop (250px width for filters), 3-4 column product grid. Mobile uses a slide-out sheet or drawer for filters.
page_specific_guidelines.product_detail: Sticky add-to-cart on mobile scroll. Image gallery on left, details on right. Seller trust badges (violet accent) and Shiprocket integration info visible.
page_specific_guidelines.cart_checkout: Clean checkout flow. Clearly show subtotal, shipping, duties. Finance accents (emerald) for secure Stripe checkout.

hero_carousel.description: Woman in red and gold bridal outfit
hero_carousel.title: Bridal Collection

hero_carousel.description: Table topped with different types of spices
hero_carousel.title: Authentic Spices

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure shadcn/ui components are modified to reflect the warm, slightly rounded styling instead of default severe Vercel looks. Strip away standard Next/Vercel defaults. Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Apply the specified Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Enforce responsive grid layouts that keep e-commerce cards breathable. Never use Inter or Roboto.
